standard: Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act (RPwD) 2016 + Harmonized Guidelines (MoHUA) + NBC India 2016

criteria.name: Wheelchair Ramp
criteria.description: Ramp with 1:12 slope ratio, minimum 1200mm width, with handrails on both sides

criteria.name: Tactile Guiding Path
criteria.description: Tactile ground surface indicators (TGSIs) for visually impaired navigation from entrance to boarding point

criteria.name: Audio Signals & Announcements
criteria.description: Audio announcement system for bus/train arrivals, route numbers, and safety warnings

criteria.name: Wheelchair Space
criteria.description: Designated wheelchair parking/boarding area with minimum 900mm x 1500mm clear space

criteria.name: Braille Signage
criteria.description: Braille information boards with route maps, platform numbers, and facility locations

criteria.name: Elevator / Lift Access
criteria.description: Accessible elevator with braille buttons, audio floor indicators, minimum 1100mm x 1400mm cabin

criteria.name: Accessible Toilet
criteria.description: Wheelchair-accessible toilet with grab bars, adequate turning radius (1500mm), and emergency alarm

criteria.name: Staff Assistance & Training
criteria.description: Trained staff available to assist persons with disabilities, with disability awareness training
